reviews.comment:
Tienen los 4 combustibles.
Super nafta
Premium nafta
Diesel 500
Diesel premium

Atención!! El diesel premium desde diciembre a marzo suele acabarse. Y si tenes que volver a purmamarca vas a estar muy justo. Llevar combustible de reserva antes de salir hacia Jama. Yo tuve suerte de que habia Diesel premium y no tuve inconvenientes.

Aquel que puede meterle al tanque de combustible vino tinto y anda igual, no va a tener nungun tipo de problemas.🤣

(Translated by Google)
They have all four fuels.

Super gasoline
Premium gasoline
Diesel 500
Premium diesel

Attention!! Premium diesel usually runs out from December to March. And if you have to go back to Purmamarca, you'll be very short on fuel. Bring spare fuel before heading to Jama. I was lucky that there was premium diesel and I didn't have any problems.

Anyone who can put red wine in their fuel tank and still drive won't have any problems. 🤣
